common.siteSubtitle: Roslyn source generators for Prism MVVM
common.toggleSidebar: Expand or collapse the navigation sidebar

home.heroLead: MvvmAIO.Prism.SourceGenerators eliminates boilerplate for observable properties, commands, and container registration while preserving BindableBase semantics.
home.whatObservable: ObservableProperty for fields and C# 13 partial properties, with OnChanging / OnChanged hooks and NotifyPropertyChangedFor.
home.whatCommands: DelegateCommand and AsyncDelegateCommand generation from methods, including ValueTask support.
home.whatRegistration: Attributes such as RegisterForNavigation and RegisterSingleton to emit IContainerRegistry registration code.
home.whatDiagnostics: PSG diagnostics with code fixes (for example MakePartial) where the generator can guide you.
home.layoutCore: Prism.SourceGenerators.Core/ — attributes consumed by your app and seen by the generator.
home.layoutRoslyn: Prism.SourceGenerators.Roslyn* — version-specific compiler targets for NuGet compatibility.
home.layoutBcl: Prism.Bcl.Commands/ — optional Prism 8 AsyncDelegateCommand compatibility package.
home.layoutSamples: Sample Avalonia apps live in the separate Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples repository.
home.nugetSourceGeneratorsDesc: Core source-generator package for ObservableProperty, command generation, and container registration.
home.nugetBclCommandsDesc: Compatibility package that fills AsyncDelegateCommand support for Prism 8 scenarios.
home.moreDeepWiki: DeepWiki mirrors this repo with a navigable outline (architecture, pipeline, diagnostics, packaging).
home.moreReadme: The GitHub README remains the authoritative feature list and API examples.
home.githubSummary: README, CONTRIBUTING, CI workflows, and issue tracker.

gettingStarted.title: Install and reference
gettingStarted.lead: Add the NuGet package to a Prism app that uses BindableBase (or compatible base). Use partial types where the generator requires them.
gettingStarted.stepPackageBody: Install MvvmAIO.Prism.SourceGenerators from NuGet. It bundles the Core attributes assembly.
gettingStarted.stepPartialBody: Annotate partial classes so the generator can extend them. Fix PSG0001–PSG0004 with the MakePartial code fix when offered.
gettingStarted.stepPrismBody: On Prism.Core 8.1.97 you may also need MvvmAIO.Prism.Bcl.Commands for AsyncDelegateCommand. Prism 9 includes async commands in-box.
gettingStarted.stepSamplesBody: Clone Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples for Avalonia demos targeting Prism 8 and Prism 9.
gettingStarted.reqIde: Visual Studio 2022 17.13+ / Rider / VS Code with C# Dev Kit (`.slnx` support)
gettingStarted.reqPrismBase: Prism app with `BindableBase` (or compatible base type)
gettingStarted.recommendedPackagesBody: `MvvmAIO.Prism.SourceGenerators` bundles source generator attributes from `MvvmAIO.Prism.Core`. For Prism.Core 8.1.97 async commands, add `MvvmAIO.Prism.Bcl.Commands` manually.
gettingStarted.buildNukeLabel: Run CI-like local pipeline via Nuke:
gettingStarted.upgradeCsharp13: C# 13+ supports partial-property `[ObservableProperty]` targets using `field` keyword.
gettingStarted.upgradeCsharp14: C# 14+ command generation can use `field` directly (no private backing field).
gettingStarted.upgradeValueTask: `ValueTask` / `ValueTask<T>` execute methods are supported by async command generation via `.AsTask()`.
gettingStarted.upgradePsg3002: If async command symbols are missing, generator reports PSG3002 with package guidance.

generators.title: Generator surface area
generators.lead: The following areas map closely to the DeepWiki table of contents and the README generator sections.
generators.obsBody: Field-backed and partial-property modes, PropertyAccess, forwarding attributes with property: target, and coordination with NotifyPropertyChangedFor / NotifyCanExecuteChangedFor.
generators.cmdBody: DelegateCommand and AsyncDelegateCommand from methods; can-execute patterns and command dependency refresh.
generators.regBody: Registration attributes analyzed to emit Register / RegisterForNavigation calls for Prism IContainerRegistry.
generators.diagBody: PSG codes for unresolved symbols, invalid signatures, and partial-class requirements — many include IDE code fixes.
generators.topicsSuffix: outline (incremental generator pipeline, command generators, registration internals, PSG diagnostics, packaging).
generators.twoModesBody: Field target works in all C# versions. Partial-property target works in C# 13+ and generates implementation using `field`. Both modes support `OnChanging` / `OnChanged` partial hooks and can coexist.
generators.dependentNotificationsItem1: `[NotifyPropertyChangedFor]` raises extra `PropertyChanged` events for dependent properties.
generators.dependentNotificationsItem3: Supports multiple names either in one attribute or by repeated attributes.
generators.commandGeneratorsItem2: `[AsyncDelegateCommand]` adds advanced options: parallel execution, catch handler, cancel-after, observes-can-execute.
generators.commandGeneratorsItem3: C# 14+ can emit command properties with `field` keyword (without explicit private backing field).
generators.observesBindableBody: `[ObservesProperty]` auto-re-evaluates command `CanExecute` when specified properties change. `[BindableBase]` can generate full `INotifyPropertyChanged` implementation for classes that do not inherit Prism `BindableBase`.
generators.diagnosticsRow100x: Invalid execute method signatures for command attributes.
generators.diagnosticsRow3002: `AsyncDelegateCommand` symbol missing; install required packages or upgrade Prism.
generators.diagnosticsQuickFix: PSG0001-PSG0004 include IDE quick-fixes to insert `partial` automatically.

reference.title: External documentation
reference.lead: Use these alongside this micro-site. Content on DeepWiki is community/AI indexed from the repository and may lag behind main.
reference.cardWikiBody: Structured topics: incremental generator pipeline, shared helpers, packaging, multi-Roslyn targeting, CI, and testing.
reference.cardGitHubBody: Source, issues, pull requests, and CI badges for MvvmAIO/Prism.SourceGenerators.
reference.cardSamplesBody: Prism.SourceGenerators.Samples — Avalonia projects consuming the package.
reference.repoStructureBody: Core architecture uses a shared generator project plus multiple Roslyn-target projects for package compatibility.
reference.buildNukeBody: Typical local workflow for build, test, pack, and publish from the main source repository.
reference.ciSignalsItem1: `.NET` workflow badge tracks latest pipeline status on `master`.
reference.ciSignalsItem2: `Tests` badge reports pass/fail/skip counts from latest run.
reference.ciSignalsItem3: Workflow uploads `test-results` (`.trx`) artifacts for detailed diagnostics.
reference.coverageScopeTitle: Coverage Scope in This Docs Site
reference.coverageScopeBody: This site now summarizes the majority of README and DeepWiki-oriented content: generator surfaces (`ObservableProperty`, command generators, notifications, observes, bindable-base), diagnostics (PSG series), compatibility expectations, project topology, build and release workflows, plus source links. For full canonical details and latest updates, always cross-check the main README.
